prs.title: feat: Complete Skematic Platform Implementation with Dynamic Readiness Dashboard
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 3921 lines of custom work across 78 files establishing the entire Skematic platform from scratch — including AI readiness agents, dynamic dashboard with company scoring, auth/session, data field calculators, UI framework with branding, Docker infrastructure, and database setup — represents a transformative, multi-week foundational build.

prs.title: chore: enhance .gitignore for better security and development workflow
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A 12-line addition to .gitignore is a trivial configuration tweak with no functional impact.

stories.name: Launch Skematic AI Readiness Platform
stories.rationale: Delivered the complete Skematic platform with a dynamic readiness dashboard alongside foundational security and workflow improvements to support ongoing development.
